_warning: PLACEHOLDER ILLUSTRATIVE DATA — fees, exchange-rate markups, supported corridors and speed claims below are realistic but have NOT been individually verified against each provider's current pricing page. Cross-check every numeric value at the official_url before launch. Update last_verified and verified_source after each pass.
_affiliate_note: affiliate_url: replace PLACEHOLDER with a Commission Factory / direct affiliate link once approved. When real, the button auto-switches to rel='sponsored noopener'. Until then, the CTA falls back to official_url with rel='noopener' so every button stays functional.

providers.name: Wise
pros: Uses the real mid-market exchange rate — no hidden markup
Transparent fee shown before you confirm the send
Multi-currency account with AUD, USD, GBP, EUR balances
cons: Bank deposit only — no cash pickup available

providers.name: Remitly
providers.tagline: Fast cash pickup and bank deposit
pros: Cash pickup at thousands of agent locations
First transfer usually has zero fees and a promo rate
cons: Exchange rate includes a markup over mid-market
Cheaper Economy option is slower (3–5 days)

providers.name: OFX
providers.tagline: Zero fee on large transfers, dedicated dealer
pros: Zero transfer fee on amounts over $250 AUD
Dedicated account manager for amounts over $20,000
Strong AUD rates for medium and large transfers
cons: Bank deposit only — no cash pickup

providers.name: WorldRemit
providers.tagline: Cash pickup, mobile money, broad country reach
pros: Cash pickup across a 130+ country agent network
Mobile wallet transfers (great for parts of Asia & Africa)
cons: Higher exchange rate markup than Wise

providers.name: Western Union
pros: The largest cash pickup network in the world
Cash arrives within minutes for in-person pickup
Easy for family to find — recognisable brand
cons: Highest exchange rate markup of these five
Fees stack up on smaller amounts
Better for urgency than for saving money
